title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Gurgaon location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited!
